title: Senior Front-End Architect & Developer
subtitle: 26 years of software engineering experience designing large-scale front-end platforms.
about1: I am a civil engineer in computer science with 26 years of experience in software architecture and development. I specialize in front-end platforms, combining architectural responsibility with hands-on development to build scalable, maintainable systems in complex enterprise environments.
about2: I leverage deep technical expertise with structured AI-assisted workflows to accelerate delivery and ensure long-term clarity and quality. With extensive experience shaping React-based initiatives at major Swedish companies, I bring a pragmatic, collaborative approach that turns architectural decisions into sustainable systems.

services.title: Software Architecture
services.content: Design and structure front-end platforms for maintainable, robust, and adaptable solutions.

services.title: Front-End Development
services.content: Build modern web applications with React and TypeScript. Use structured AI-assisted workflows to accelerate development and maintainability.

services.title: Technical Leadership
services.content: Guide teams in architectural decisions, best practices, and engineering culture to improve collaboration and delivery quality.

services.title: Code Review & Assessment
services.content: Review codebases, identify technical debt, and provide recommendations to improve reliability and maintainability.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.content: Available for consulting engagements in Stockholm and remotely.
